upcoming.name: Reading Aloud with Intention
upcoming.descriptionHtml: A practical workshop on how to read aloud in ways that invite conversation—not just comprehension. We'll cover pacing, voice, and how to pause in the right places.

past.name: Books for Big Feelings
past.descriptionHtml: An exploration of picture books that help children name and navigate difficult emotions, with guidance on how to talk through them afterward.
